{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"flowchart LR subgraph Input Sources OPT[Constructor Options] SET[fable.settings.PostgreSQL] end subgraph Normalization NORM["Property Mapping
Server -> host
Port -> port
User -> user
Password -> password
Database -> database
ConnectionPoolLimit -> max"] end subgraph Output PGPOOL["pg.Pool Config
{ host, port, user,
password, database, max }"] end OPT --> NORM SET --> NORM NORM --> PGPOOL ","style":"notebook"}
